problem id: 26410094
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10001001 -> 01100010
  01100100 -> 00011001
  01100110 -> 10011001
  10110001 -> 01101100
  00110011 -> 01001100
  10111000 -> 00101110
  11111101 -> 01111111
  01110010 -> 10011100

query: 01000010
predicted answer: 10010000
